prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年物理类最低位次分别约为30997、30894、23528、28362、30544名。2023年出现明显前移至23528名，但2024-2025年回弹至约2.8万-3.1万名区间，20 25年基准约30544名，近两年波动幅度约2000名；该校在广东物理类招生计划：2021年102人、2022年100人、2023年101人、2024年93人、2025年87人，呈逐年小 幅缩减趋势。2026年计划93人，较2025年扩招6人（+6.9%），扩招对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学是211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排 名2026年第80名，近年排名稳定在79-83名区间，属于中上水平211；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件通报；抖音热度排名第77位，评价为"一般" ，短视频曝光量处于中游水平，未出现高热关注信号；2025年声誉亦偏负面（热门专业投档线暴跌），整体报考热度平稳偏弱；第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与 工程获评A，为该校唯一A级学科。招生专业中计算机科学与技术、电子信息类、电气工程等工科专业与学校理工特色高度契合，但缺乏A+级顶尖学科支撑。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、电子信息、电气等工科专业社会热度持续偏高；广东省物理类考生2025年440208人，2026年456000人，增加约3.6%，竞争有所加剧；省控线方面，2025年物理类本科批 436分，较2024年442分略降，整体难度变化不大；合肥工业大学位于安徽省合肥市，非广东本省高校，无本地招生倾斜。该校在广东招生规模约90-100人，占比 较小，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次30544名、2026年扩招6.9%（缓解竞争）、广东物理类考生增加3.6%（加剧竞争）以及声誉偏弱等因素，扩 招效应与考生增加效应基本对冲，但声誉偏弱和考生增加略占上风，预计最低位次较2025年小幅前移。预测2026年物理类最低位次约31608名，区间31108-32108名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 30997, 30894, 23528, 28362, and 30544 respectively. In 2023, there was a significant forward shift to 23528, but from 2024 to 2025 it rebounded to the range of about 28000-31000, with a baseline of about 30544 in 2025. The fluctuation range in the past two years is about 2000 places. The enrollment plan for this university in Guangdong Physics Category: 102 in 2021, 100 in 2022, 101 in 2023, 93 in 2024, and 87 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 93, an increase of 6 students (+6.9%) compared to 2025, which has a certain alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 80th, with a stable ranking range of 79-83 in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving reports of academic misconduct incidents. The Douyin popularity ranking is 77th, with an evaluation of 'average', and short video exposure is at a mid-level, without high attention signals. The reputation in 2025 was also slightly negative (the admission cutoff scores for popular majors plummeted), and overall application enthusiasm is stable but weak. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A, which is the only A-level discipline of this university. Among the enrollment majors, Computer Science and Technology, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors are highly consistent with the university's science and engineering characteristics, but lack support from top A+ disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. The number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province was 440208 in 2025 and 456000 in 2026, an increase of about 3.6%, intensifying competition. Regarding the provincial control line, the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score was 436, slightly lower than 442 in 2024, with little overall difficulty change. Hefei University of Technology is located in Hefei City, Anhui Province, not a local university in Guangdong, so there is no local enrollment preference. The enrollment scale of this university in Guangdong is about 90-100 people, accounting for a small proportion, and the influence of regional preference factors is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 30544, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 6.9% (alleviating competition), the increase of 3.6% in Guangdong Physics Category candidates (intensifying competition), and the slightly weak reputation, the expansion effect and the candidate increase effect basically offset each other, but the slightly weak reputation and candidate increase slightly dominate, so the minimum ranking is expected to shift slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 31608, with a range of 31108-32108.

If your ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (e.g., within 31000), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (e.g., around 32000), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 8001, 7899, 8163, 8441, and 14434 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, it was basically stable in the range of 8000-8500, but in 2025 it significantly dropped to 14434, mainly due to a sharp increase in the provincial control line (from 428 points in 2024 to 464 points in 2025 for undergraduate batch); History Category enrollment plan: 10 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 12 in 2024, 15 in 2025, showing an expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 15, the same as 2025, with no additional expansion/reduction effect.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class, with a soft science ranking of about 80, stable level; in 2026, reputation is slightly negative, Douyin popularity is average, with limited impact on liberal arts major applications; Management Science and Engineering is A, but the History Category enrollment majors (Law, Ideological and Political Education, English, Indonesian) have low correlation with this discipline, and the advantageous disciplines have limited appeal to liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has high social popularity, but language majors have weak popularity; Guangdong Province History Category candidates: 292,200 in 2025, 326,200 in 2026, a significant increase of about 11.6%, intensifying competition; the provincial control line in 2025 (464 points) significantly increased compared to 2024 (428 points), pushing up admission rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: The significant drop in rankings in 2025 was mainly affected by the jump in the provincial control line. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 14134, with a range of 13634-14634.
